;<span id="Forgetting_curve">forgetting curve</span>
:[[File:Forgetting curves.jpg|thumb|SuperMemo: Toolkit : Statistics : Analysis : Forgetting Curves graphs for 20 repetition number categories multiplied by 20 A-Factor categories]] describes the decline in the probability of recall over time. A forgetting curve graph in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]] shows how fast the memorized information gets forgotten. A '''forgetting curve''' graph shows time on its X axis, and percent recall on its Y axis. It can be viewed with '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Toolkit menu#Statistics|Statistics]] : [[Analysis]] : [[Analysis#Forgetting Curves|Forgetting Curves]]'''. [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]] collects 400 '''forgetting curves''' for 20 levels of [[Glossary:Difficulty|knowledge difficulty]] and 20 levels of memory [[Glossary:Stability|stability]].
